zh.lifeSummary: 當Dreux de Boves於大約1022年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆波福斯時，他的父親Hugues DE BOVES D'ACHEY-DE FERRIERES48歲，母親Avoise d'Aigle40歲。他與Melisende結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1106年在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dreux de Boves于大约1022年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆波福斯时，他的父亲Hugues DE BOVES D'ACHEY-DE FERRIERES48岁，母亲Avoise d'Aigle40岁。他与Melisende结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1106年在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Boves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Czech (Boreš): from a pet form of any of various compound personal names, formed with the Slavic element bor ‘to fight’ (see Borak ).

variants.name: Borak
meanings: Polish, Croatian, and Serbian: from a pet form of any of various Slavic compound personal names, formed with the element bor ‘to fight’ (from Old Slavic and South Slavic boriti se), e.g. Polish Borzysław, Croatian and Serbian Borislav (see also Boris ).

Czech and Slovak (Borák): habitational name for someone from any of many places called with bor ‘pine forest’; alternatively, from a pet form of any of various Slavic compound personal names, containing the element bor ‘to fight’, e.g. Czech Dalibor (compare 1 above).
Slovak (Borák): nickname or topographic name from the plant name borák ‘borage’.

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, now used as a given name throughout the English-speaking world. In the 20th century it was particularly popular in Australia. The surname was originally a Norman baronial name, but a precise identification of the place from which it was derived has not been made (there are a large number of possible candidates). The Bruces were an influential Norman family in Scottish affairs in the early Middle Ages; its most famous member was  Robert  ‘the Bruce’ (  1274–1329 ), who is said to have drawn inspiration after his defeat at Methven from the perseverance of a spider in repeatedly climbing up again after being knocked down. He ruled Scotland as  King Robert I  from  1306 to 1329 .

en.lifeSummary: When Dreux de Boves was born about 1022, in Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Hugues DE BOVES D'ACHEY-DE FERRIERES, was 48 and his mother, Avoise d'Aigle, was 40. He married Melisende. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1106, in Cheux, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dreux de Boves est né environ 1022, à Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Hugues DE BOVES D'ACHEY-DE FERRIERES, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Avoise d'Aigle, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Melisende. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1106, à Cheux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dreux de Boves um 1022 in Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues DE BOVES D'ACHEY-DE FERRIERES 48 und seine Mutter Avoise d'Aigle 40. Er hat Melisende geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1106 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Cheux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dreux de Boves è nato il circa 1022 nel Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues DE BOVES D'ACHEY-DE FERRIERES, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Avoise d'Aigle, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Melisende. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1106, nel Cheux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dreux de Bovesが約1022年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメボベスで生まれた時，父Hugues DE BOVES D'ACHEY-DE FERRIERESは48歳，母Avoise d'Aigleは40歳であった。Melisendeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1106年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスチェウックスで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dreux de Boves(이)가 대략 1022년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 보브스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues DE BOVES D'ACHEY-DE FERRIERES(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Avoise d'Aigle(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Melisende(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1106년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 체우스에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dreux de Boves nasceu aproximadamente 1022, em Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Hugues DE BOVES D'ACHEY-DE FERRIERES, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Avoise d'Aigle, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Melisende. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1106, em Cheux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dreux de Boves родился около 1022 г. в местности бовесь, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues DE BOVES D'ACHEY-DE FERRIERES было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Avoise d'Aigle, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Melisende. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1106 г. в местности чеукс, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dreux de Boves nació aproximadamente 1022, en Boves, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Hugues DE BOVES D'ACHEY-DE FERRIERES, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Avoise d'Aigle, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Melisende. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1106, en Cheux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 85 años.
